vllm.title: [Kernel] Support Fp8 Checkpoints (Dynamic + Static)
vllm.author: robertgshaw2-redhat
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR does two things:

Supports loading serialized fp8 models with static weight and act scales
Supports loading serialized fp8 models with static weight scales and dynamic activations scales

For loading serialized models, vllm auto-detects if merged Layers (QKV / Gate-UpProj) have a shared weig

vllm.title: [Frontend] Support complex message content for chat completions endpoint
vllm.author: fgreinacher

vllm.title: [Frontend] [Core] Tensorizer: support dynamic `num_readers`, update version
vllm.author: alpayariyak
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
This PR adds support for and defaults to dynamic selection of num_readers for loading the model with tensorizer. The feature was added in the latest version of tensorizer, 2.9.0.
Dynamic selection happens based on memory resources and model size. Previously, you had to manually set the number, the o

vllm.title: [Bugfix][Minor] Make ignore_eos effective
vllm.author: bigPYJ1151
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
#4182 introduced a change to update eos_token_id into stop_token_ids from generation_config.json. But the change didn't check ignore_eos flag.
This PR fixed this problem.

vllm.title: Unable to find Punica extension issue during source code installation
vllm.author: kingljl
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Due to project requirements, vllm was used to compile and install the source code. Using the "pip install - e" command, it was found that the "import vllm. punica_c as punica_kernels" prompt indicated that the punica extension could not be found.
The dependent environment variable VLLM_INSTALL_PUNIC

vllm.title: [Core] Centralize GPU Worker construction
vllm.author: njhill
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Add _get_worker_kwargs and _create_worker methods to GPUExecutor which construct Worker instances from the executor configuration, and make use of these in places where the logic is currently duplicated.
This will also be used by the to-be-added MultiprocessingGPUExecutor.

vllm.title: Allow user to define whitespace pattern for outlines
vllm.author: robcaulk
vllm.bodyExcerpt: Outlines allows the user to define the whitespace_pattern. This PR allows vLLM users to define this value so that it is properly passed to Outlines.
